mechanism_note: GLP-1 receptor agonist hypothesized to reduce neuroinflammation and improve neuronal insulin signaling; being tested for early symptomatic Alzheimer disease.
GLP-1 receptor agonist proposed to support neuronal glucose metabolism and dampen neuroinflammatory signaling; evaluated in mild Alzheimer disease.
Biguanide activating AMPK / modulating brain insulin signaling; repurposing hypothesis for MCI and early Alzheimer disease based on metabolic-dysfunction rationale.
PP2A activator hypothesized to reduce tau hyperphosphorylation; small tau-directed repurposing trials in Alzheimer disease.
c-Abl tyrosine-kinase inhibitor hypothesized to promote autophagic clearance of misfolded amyloid/tau; explored in small early-phase Alzheimer disease studies.
Recombinant GM-CSF hypothesized to modulate innate-immune / microglial clearance activity; early-phase repurposing in mild-to-moderate Alzheimer disease.
TNF-alpha inhibitor hypothesized to reduce astroglial/microglial neuroinflammatory signaling; pilot repurposing trials in Alzheimer disease.
Cysteinyl-leukotriene receptor antagonist hypothesized to lower neuroinflammation and support neurovascular integrity; repurposing interest in Alzheimer disease.
HMG-CoA reductase inhibitor; cholesterol/APOE-pathway repurposing hypothesis for Alzheimer disease based on vascular and lipid-handling rationale.
Angiotensin-II receptor blocker with PPAR-gamma activity; renin-angiotensin / vascular repurposing hypothesis for Alzheimer disease risk reduction.
Angiotensin-II receptor blocker hypothesized to improve cerebrovascular regulation; repurposing interest in prodromal Alzheimer disease / MCI.
RXR agonist hypothesized to enhance APOE-mediated amyloid clearance; small exploratory repurposing study in Alzheimer disease (results equivocal).
